To turn the scheduler on in production
Set CRON_SECRET in the production environment.
Add to vercel.json (or your scheduler of choice):

{ "crons": [{ "path": "/api/cron/email-scheduler", "schedule": "0 13 * * *" }] }
Walk through §6 of KLAVIYO_LIVE_TEST_PLAN.md — Phase 3 + scheduler test pass is now fully written, not a placeholder.
Phases 4 (change notifications + critical-SMS) and 5 (post-cruise + alumni) remain.
